message.content: The weather report task for Indianapolis is configured to run daily at 08:30 America/New_York but is currently disabled. A successful setup would be indicated by a stored job_id and a status of "disabled" until explicitly enabled.

details.message: Task requires runtime-specific executor not available in GitHub runner.
